name: agentic-security
description: Full ASPM coverage in a Claude Code plugin: SAST, SCA (with function-level reachability + CISA KEV), secrets, IaC, prompt-injection / LLM-app security, MCP / agent-tool audit, auth/authZ deep analysis, attack chains, adversarial PoC, business-logic review, toxic-combinations scoring, material-change detection, drift reporting, SBOM (CycloneDX + SPDX) + PBOM, SARIF ingest, API inventory, pipeline integrity, license policy, MTTR / SLA tracking, auto-fix PR bundling, container layer scan, dependency confusion + typosquat detection, OSC&R coverage map, and 4-framework compliance attestation (NIST AI 600-1, OWASP ASVS, PCI-DSS 4.0, SOC 2). Local-first, F1-evaluated, no cloud lock-in.
